overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit commercial district in Night City. The player walks along a wet street, ascends a large staircase, and explores an elevated pedestrian plaza with palm trees and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane commercial street with neon signage

events.description: approaching the staircase entrance, slowing slightly before the ascent

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet reflective street, passing the KENDACHI building on the right

entered.detail: tall building with large illuminated KENDACHI signage in red and white
reflective multi-lane road surface with neon reflections
teal and purple neon strips on building facades
large staircase leading upward with teal accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet multi-lane street at night, surrounded by towering buildings with vibrant neon lights. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk, passing the prominent KENDACHI building on the right while approaching a large staircase ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered staircase with teal neon lighting

events.description: entering the covered staircase from the street level
reaching the top of the staircase and preparing to exit

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete staircase with metal railings, teal neon lights illuminating the left wall

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal handrails on both sides
continuous teal neon light strip running along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a long, covered staircase illuminated by teal neon lights. The enclosed space creates a tunnel-like effect as the camera climbs steadily upward, leaving the street level behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with palm trees and holographic ads

events.description: exiting the staircase into the open-air plaza
entering area with palm trees and increased pedestrian activity

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza, passing palm trees and other pedestrians, heading toward the large red holographic sign

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white jacket walking across the plaza
pedestrian in yellow jacket walking away from camera

entered.detail: tall palm trees with illuminated square bases
large circular red holographic advertisement floating above the plaza
reflective tiled ground surface mirroring the neon lights
benches and tables along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the scene opens into a spacious elevated plaza with palm trees and reflective wet pavement. Pedestrians walk through the area while a large red holographic sign glows in the distance, surrounded by towering buildings covered in neon advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with benches and vending machines

events.description: turning right into the covered walkway area
entering darker covered area with overhead geometric lighting

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking through the covered plaza area, passing illuminated benches and potted plants

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking ahead on the right side

entered.detail: overhead structure with geometric light patterns and dark panels
illuminated circular seating areas with warm lighting
large rectangular planters with green foliage

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a semi-covered walkway featuring modern benches with integrated lighting and potted plants. The area is more enclosed than the open plaza, with overhead structures creating a transition space between outdoor and indoor environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with vending machines and corporate signage

events.description: approaching the Fuyutsuki Electronics signage area
passing illuminated vending machines and digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: approaching the Fuyutsuki Electronics sign, walking past vending machines and a man smoking near the wall

notable_agents.action: man with long gray hair and sunglasses standing against the wall smoking a cigarette

entered.detail: large red illuminated sign reading FUYUTSUKI ELECTRONICS with Japanese text below
illuminated soda vending machines with bright advertisements
vertical screen showing circus advertisement with bright colors

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a commercial area dominated by the large red Fuyutsuki Electronics sign. The camera passes illuminated vending machines and digital billboards while a pedestrian stands smoking near the wall, creating a dense cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked city street up into a dense, neon-lit elevated commercial plaza. It begins by moving along a wet sidewalk past the towering Kendachi building before ascending a long, covered staircase bathed in teal neon light. As the camera emerges from this tunnel-like climb, the environment opens into a spacious upper plaza featuring palm trees, reflective pavement, and a glowing red holographic sign. The scene then shifts into a semi-covered walkway with integrated bench lighting and potted plants before turning toward a crowded commercial hub. Finally, the camera passes illuminated vending machines and digital billboards to arrive beneath the massive red Fuyutsuki Electronics sign.
